creator: freebsd@grem.de
text:
Was in the process of changing xerces-c2, and already created a patch.
Usually I wouldn't open a PR for such a trivial modification, sorry
for stealing your time (and yet I did).

See also: http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2012-October/078676.html


Port maintainer (gahr@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
